blocks.title: Adding Fractions
blocks.body: When two fractions share the same bottom number (denominator), adding them is simple — just add the top numbers (numerators) and keep the denominator exactly the same.

blocks.title: Let's work through 2/5 + 1/5 together
steps: ✅ Both fractions have the same denominator: 5
🔒 Keep the denominator the same: still 5

blocks.question: What is 1/4 + 2/4?
blocks.hint: Add the top numbers (1 + 2) and keep the bottom number (4) the same.

blocks.question: Which addition equals 4/6?
blocks.hint: You need the numerators to add up to 4. Which pair gives you 4?

blocks.message: Amazing! You can add fractions with the same denominator!
